recommendations.title: Enhance ESG Disclosure Aligned with BRSR and GRI
recommendations.description: Waaree Energies should immediately improve ESG disclosures in line with BRSR and GRI frameworks to avoid SEBI scrutiny and trading restrictions, reducing cost of capital by 20-40 bps.
recommendations.profitability_link: Avoiding a 20 bps increase in cost of capital on a ₹5,000 Cr market cap saves ₹10 Cr annually
recommendations.peer_benchmark: Tata Power enhanced ESG disclosures contributing to P/E rerating

recommendations.title: Achieve CDP A-List Inclusion by FY26
recommendations.description: Implement comprehensive climate risk management and disclosure to achieve CDP A-list status, unlocking valuation premium and attracting ESG funds.
recommendations.profitability_link: CDP A-list inclusion can increase valuation premium by 5-10%, equating to ₹250-500 Cr on ₹5,000 Cr market cap
recommendations.peer_benchmark: Leading renewables firms gain valuation premium via CDP A-list

recommendations.title: Develop Export Market Diversification Strategy
recommendations.description: Formulate and implement a diversification plan to reduce dependency on US exports, mitigating ₹50-200 Cr market cap loss risk from tariff impacts.
recommendations.profitability_link: Reducing export risk can prevent up to ₹200 Cr market cap loss, preserving shareholder value
recommendations.peer_benchmark: No direct peer diversification noted, opportunity to lead

recommendations.title: Issue Green Bonds to Fund Renewable Expansion
recommendations.description: Raise ₹500 Cr via green bonds aligned with EU Taxonomy to finance renewable projects, lowering cost of capital and enhancing ESG positioning.
recommendations.profitability_link: Lowering cost of capital by 30 bps on ₹5,000 Cr reduces financing costs by ₹15 Cr annually
recommendations.peer_benchmark: Tata Power issued ₹5,000 Cr green bonds, achieving P/E rerating

immediate_high.title: Enhance ESG Disclosure Aligned with BRSR and GRI
Achieve CDP A-List Inclusion by FY26

deferred_high.title: Issue Green Bonds to Fund Renewable Expansion
